final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial illustration of a steampunk mechanical apparatus.

Style/medium: steampunk illustration, intricate mechanical engineering art, Victorian industrial aesthetic
Composition: detailed cross-section view showing internal mechanisms, balanced arrangement of components
Subject: complex mechanical apparatus with interlocking gears, brass pipes, pressure gauges, and dials
Scene/backdrop: neutral background to emphasize the machinery, subtle workshop atmosphere
Lighting/mood: warm ambient light highlighting metallic surfaces, nostalgic and precise atmosphere
Color palette: warm brass and copper tones as base, aged bronze accents, dark iron contrast
Materials/textures: polished brass with patina, copper tubing with rivets, engraved Victorian decorative motifs, visible gear teeth and mechanical joints
Avoid: modern plastic materials, clean minimalist surfaces, electric blue LEDs, generic sci-fi aesthetics
